message:
Refactor CI/CD workflows with reusable components (#13)

## Summary
- Fix publish workflow that was failing due to removed scripts
- Extract OCSF schema build logic into reusable composite action
(`.github/actions/build-ocsf/`)
- Both `test.yml` and `publish.yml` now use the shared action

## Root Cause
The `publish.yml` workflow still referenced `scripts/download-docs.py`
and related scripts that were removed in commit 923ff37 when they were
consolidated into the bootstrap module.

## Test plan
- [ ] CI test workflow passes on this PR
- [ ] After merge, manually trigger publish workflow to verify PyPI
release works

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+name: Bootstrap Data
+description: Bootstrap documentation and OCSF schemas for building/testing
+
+inputs:
+  github-token:
+    description: GitHub token for downloading docs
+    required: true
+
+runs:
+  using: composite
+  steps:
+    - name: Bootstrap documentation
+      shell: bash
+      run: uv run python -m tenzir_mcp.bootstrap --docs-only
+      env:
+        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ inputs.github-token }}
+
+    - name: Build OCSF schemas
+      uses: ./.github/actions/build-ocsf

@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@
+name: Build OCSF Schemas
+description: Build OCSF schemas locally using the official ocsf-server
+
+runs:
+  using: composite
+  steps:
+    - name: Set up Elixir
+      uses: erlef/setup-beam@v1
+      with:
+        elixir-version: "1.17"
+        otp-version: "27"
+
+    - name: Clone OCSF repositories
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/ocsf/ocsf-server.git /tmp/ocsf-server
+        git clone https://github.com/ocsf/ocsf-schema.git /tmp/ocsf-schema
+
+    - name: Build OCSF server
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        cd /tmp/ocsf-server
+        mix local.hex --force
+        mix local.rebar --force
+        mix deps.get
+        mix compile
+
+    - name: Export OCSF schemas
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        cat > /tmp/export_schema.exs << 'EOF'
+        [version, output_path] = System.argv()
+        json = Schema.export_schema() |> Jason.encode!()
+        File.write!(output_path, json)
+        IO.puts("Exported #{version} to #{output_path}")
+        EOF
+
+        OCSF_OUT="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/src/tenzir_mcp/data/ocsf"
+        mkdir -p "$OCSF_OUT"
+
+        for tag in v1.0.0 v1.1.0 v1.2.0 1.3.0 1.4.0 1.5.0 1.6.0 1.7.0; do
+          version="${tag#v}"
+          echo "Exporting OCSF $version..."
+          cd /tmp/ocsf-schema && git checkout "$tag" --quiet
+          cd /tmp/ocsf-server
+          SCHEMA_DIR=/tmp/ocsf-schema SCHEMA_EXTENSION=extensions \
+            mix run /tmp/export_schema.exs "$version" "${OCSF_OUT}/${version}.json" \
+            2>/dev/null
+        done
+
+        echo "Exported schemas:"
+        ls -la "$OCSF_OUT"

@@ -0,0 +1,53 @@
+name: Build
+
+on:
+  workflow_call:
+    inputs:
+      check-twine:
+        description: Run twine check on the package
+        type: boolean
+        default: false
+    secrets:
+      github-token:
+        description: GitHub token for downloading docs
+        required: true
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
+
+      - name: Set up Python
+        run: uv python install 3.12
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: uv sync --all-extras --dev
+
+      - name: Bootstrap data
+        uses: ./.github/actions/bootstrap-data
+        with:
+          github-token: ${{ secrets.github-token }}
+
+      - name: Build package
+        run: |
+          uv build
+          ls -la dist/
+
+      - name: Check package
+        run: |
+          uv venv
+          uv pip install check-wheel-contents ${{ inputs.check-twine && 'twine' || '' }}
+          uv run check-wheel-contents dist/*.whl
+          ${{ inputs.check-twine && 'uv run twine check dist/*' || '' }}
+
+      - name: Upload artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: python-package-distributions
+          path: dist/
+          retention-days: 7

@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  # Run test matrix
+  test-ubuntu-312:
+    name: Test Python 3.12 on ubuntu-latest
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/tests.yml
+    with:
+      python-version: "3.12"
+      os: ubuntu-latest
+    secrets:
+      github-token: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+  test-ubuntu-313:
+    name: Test Python 3.13 on ubuntu-latest
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/tests.yml
+    with:
+      python-version: "3.13"
+      os: ubuntu-latest
+      run-typecheck: false # mypy doesn't fully support 3.13 yet
+    secrets:
+      github-token: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+  test-macos-312:
+    name: Test Python 3.12 on macos-latest
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/tests.yml
+    with:
+      python-version: "3.12"
+      os: macos-latest
+      run-lint: false
+      run-format: false
+      run-typecheck: false
+    secrets:
+      github-token: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+  test-macos-313:
+    name: Test Python 3.13 on macos-latest
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/tests.yml
+    with:
+      python-version: "3.13"
+      os: macos-latest
+      run-lint: false
+      run-format: false
+      run-typecheck: false
+    secrets:
+      github-token: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+  build:
+    name: Build distribution
+    needs: [test-ubuntu-312, test-ubuntu-313, test-macos-312, test-macos-313]
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/build.yml
+    secrets:
+      github-token: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+  test-install:
+    name: Test installation on ${{ matrix.os }}
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    needs: build
+    strategy:
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Download artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: python-package-distributions
+          path: dist/
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
+
+      - name: Test installation
+        run: uvx --from dist/*.whl tenzir-mcp --help

@@ -0,0 +1,62 @@
+name: Release
+
+on:
+  release:
+    types: [published]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  id-token: write # Required for trusted publishing
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    name: Test
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/tests.yml
+    secrets:
+      github-token: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+  build:
+    name: Build distribution
+    needs: test
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/build.yml
+    with:
+      check-twine: true
+    secrets:
+      github-token: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+  publish-to-pypi:
+    name: Publish to PyPI
+    needs: build
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: github.event_name == 'release' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
+    environment:
+      name: pypi
+      url: https://pypi.org/p/tenzir-mcp
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Download artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: python-package-distributions
+          path: dist/
+
+      - name: Publish to PyPI
+        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
+        # Uses trusted publishing - no API token needed when properly configured
+
+  verify-installation:
+    name: Verify installation
+    needs: publish-to-pypi
+    if: needs.publish-to-pypi.result == 'success'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
+
+      - name: Wait for package availability
+        run: sleep 30
+
+      - name: Test installation from PyPI
+        run: uvx tenzir-mcp --help

-jobs:
-  test:

-    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
-    strategy:
-      fail-fast: false
-      matrix:
-        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
-        python-version: ["3.12", "3.13"]
-
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-
-      - name: Install uv
-        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
-        with:
-          enable-cache: true
-          cache-dependency-glob: "**/pyproject.toml"
-
-      - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
-        run: uv python install ${{ matrix.python-version }}
-
-      - name: Install dependencies
-        run: |
-          uv sync --all-extras --dev
-
-      # =========================================================================
-      # BOOTSTRAP: Documentation
-      # =========================================================================
-      # Downloads docs from GitHub. Uses the same approach as the bootstrap
-      # script that end users run locally.
-      - name: Bootstrap documentation
-        run: uv run python -m tenzir_mcp.bootstrap --docs-only
-        env:
-          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
-
-      # =========================================================================
-      # BOOTSTRAP: OCSF Schemas
-      # =========================================================================
-      # WHY THIS IS DIFFERENT FROM THE BOOTSTRAP SCRIPT:
-      #
-      # The bootstrap script (tenzir_mcp.bootstrap) fetches OCSF schemas from
-      # the official server at https://schema.ocsf.io. This works fine locally
-      # but is unreliable in CI due to:
-      #   - Slow/unresponsive server causing timeouts
-      #   - No SLA or reliability guarantees for the public endpoint
-      #
-      # Instead, we build schemas locally using the official ocsf-server and
-      # ocsf-schema repositories. This approach:
-      #   - Clones ocsf-server (Elixir/Phoenix app) and ocsf-schema (JSON defs)
-      #   - Uses `mix run` to invoke Schema.export_schema() directly
-      #   - Exports each version by checking out the corresponding git tag
-      #   - Produces semantically identical output to the official server
-      #
-      # The only differences are array ordering in some profile lists, which
-      # has no functional impact. Verified by comparing exports from both
-      # approaches - same version, class count, object count, and content.
-      #
-      # Total time: ~45s (vs potentially infinite timeouts from official server)
-      # =========================================================================
-      - name: Set up Elixir
-        uses: erlef/setup-beam@v1
-        with:
-          elixir-version: "1.17"
-          otp-version: "27"
-
-      - name: Clone OCSF repositories
-        run: |
-          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/ocsf/ocsf-server.git /tmp/ocsf-server
-          git clone https://github.com/ocsf/ocsf-schema.git /tmp/ocsf-schema
-
-      - name: Build OCSF server
-        run: |
-          cd /tmp/ocsf-server
-          mix local.hex --force
-          mix local.rebar --force
-          mix deps.get
-          mix compile
-
-      - name: Export OCSF schemas
-        run: |
-          # Create export script
-          cat > /tmp/export_schema.exs << 'EOF'
-          [version, output_path] = System.argv()
-          json = Schema.export_schema() |> Jason.encode!()
-          File.write!(output_path, json)
-          IO.puts("Exported #{version} to #{output_path}")
-          EOF
-
-          # Create output directory (use absolute path since we cd elsewhere)
-          OCSF_OUT="${{ github.workspace }}/src/tenzir_mcp/data/ocsf"
-          mkdir -p "$OCSF_OUT"
-
-          # Export each stable version
-          # Note: Tags changed naming convention - older use 'v' prefix, newer don't
-          for tag in v1.0.0 v1.1.0 v1.2.0 1.3.0 1.4.0 1.5.0 1.6.0 1.7.0; do
-            # Normalize version (strip 'v' prefix for output filename)
-            version="${tag#v}"
-            echo "Exporting OCSF $version..."
-
-            cd /tmp/ocsf-schema
-            git checkout "$tag" --quiet
-
-            cd /tmp/ocsf-server
-            SCHEMA_DIR=/tmp/ocsf-schema SCHEMA_EXTENSION=extensions \
-              mix run /tmp/export_schema.exs "$version" "${OCSF_OUT}/${version}.json" \
-              2>/dev/null
-          done
-
-          echo "Exported schemas:"
-          ls -la "$OCSF_OUT"
-
-      - name: Lint with ruff
-        run: uv run ruff check
-        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
-
-      - name: Format check with ruff
-        run: uv run ruff format --check
-        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
-
-      - name: Type check with mypy
-        run: uv run mypy
-        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest' && matrix.python-version != '3.13'
-
-      - name: Test with pytest
-        run: |
-          uv run pytest
-
-  build:
-    name: Build distribution
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    needs: test
-
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-
-      - name: Install uv
-        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
-
-      - name: Install dependencies
-        run: |
-          uv sync --all-extras --dev
-
-      # See test job for detailed explanation of why OCSF is handled differently
-      - name: Bootstrap documentation
-        run: uv run python -m tenzir_mcp.bootstrap --docs-only
-        env:
-          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
-
-      - name: Set up Elixir
-        uses: erlef/setup-beam@v1
-        with:
-          elixir-version: "1.17"
-          otp-version: "27"
-
-      - name: Clone OCSF repositories
-        run: |
-          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/ocsf/ocsf-server.git /tmp/ocsf-server
-          git clone https://github.com/ocsf/ocsf-schema.git /tmp/ocsf-schema
-
-      - name: Build OCSF server
-        run: |
-          cd /tmp/ocsf-server
-          mix local.hex --force
-          mix local.rebar --force
-          mix deps.get
-          mix compile
-
-      - name: Export OCSF schemas
-        run: |
-          cat > /tmp/export_schema.exs << 'EOF'
-          [version, output_path] = System.argv()
-          json = Schema.export_schema() |> Jason.encode!()
-          File.write!(output_path, json)
-          IO.puts("Exported #{version} to #{output_path}")
-          EOF
-
-          OCSF_OUT="${{ github.workspace }}/src/tenzir_mcp/data/ocsf"
-          mkdir -p "$OCSF_OUT"
-
-          for tag in v1.0.0 v1.1.0 v1.2.0 1.3.0 1.4.0 1.5.0 1.6.0 1.7.0; do
-            version="${tag#v}"
-            echo "Exporting OCSF $version..."
-            cd /tmp/ocsf-schema && git checkout "$tag" --quiet
-            cd /tmp/ocsf-server
-            SCHEMA_DIR=/tmp/ocsf-schema SCHEMA_EXTENSION=extensions \
-              mix run /tmp/export_schema.exs "$version" "${OCSF_OUT}/${version}.json" \
-              2>/dev/null
-          done
-
-      - name: Build package
-        run: |
-          uv build
-          ls -la dist/
-
-      - name: Check package metadata
-        run: |
-          uv venv
-          uv pip install check-wheel-contents
-          uv run check-wheel-contents dist/*.whl
-
-      - name: Upload artifacts
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
-        with:
-          name: python-package-distributions
-          path: dist/
-          retention-days: 7
-
-  test-install:
-    name: Test installation
-    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
-    needs: build
-    strategy:
-      matrix:
-        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
-
-    steps:
-      - name: Download artifacts
-        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
-        with:
-          name: python-package-distributions
-          path: dist/
-
-      - name: Install uv
-        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
-
-      - name: Test installation
-        run: |
-          uvx --from dist/*.whl tenzir-mcp --help

@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
+name: Test Suite
+
+on:
+  workflow_call:
+    inputs:
+      python-version:
+        description: Python version to test with
+        type: string
+        default: "3.12"
+      os:
+        description: Operating system to run on
+        type: string
+        default: ubuntu-latest
+      run-lint:
+        description: Run linting checks
+        type: boolean
+        default: true
+      run-format:
+        description: Run format checks
+        type: boolean
+        default: true
+      run-typecheck:
+        description: Run type checking
+        type: boolean
+        default: true
+    secrets:
+      github-token:
+        description: GitHub token for downloading docs
+        required: true
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    runs-on: ${{ inputs.os }}
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
+        with:
+          enable-cache: true
+          cache-dependency-glob: "**/pyproject.toml"
+
+      - name: Set up Python ${{ inputs.python-version }}
+        run: uv python install ${{ inputs.python-version }}
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: uv sync --all-extras --dev
+
+      - name: Bootstrap data
+        uses: ./.github/actions/bootstrap-data
+        with:
+          github-token: ${{ secrets.github-token }}
+
+      - name: Lint with ruff
+        if: inputs.run-lint
+        run: uv run ruff check
+
+      - name: Format check with ruff
+        if: inputs.run-format
+        run: uv run ruff format --check
+
+      - name: Type check with mypy
+        if: inputs.run-typecheck && inputs.python-version != '3.13'
+        run: uv run mypy
+
+      - name: Test with pytest
+        run: uv run pytest
